title: Checklist for gender equality, disability and social inclusion (GEDSI) across FCDO  economic development programmes
body: "This report is part of the Work and Opportunities for Women (WOW) programme.  This document provides a practical tool for effective planning to ensure that economic inclusion is meaningfully integrated across all different stages of the programme cycle.  The 3 levels of ambition provided are:   minimum standard empowerment transformation   The different programme stages are:   business case and programme design mobilisation/procurement programme implementation monitoring, evaluation and learning (MEL) programme completion  "
